title: citrus rangpuriensis
intro: Citrus rangpuriensis is a species of citrus plant, native to the Indian subcontinent, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Citrus rangpuriensis include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Citrus rangpuriensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and juices, as well as being used in traditional remedies and Ayurvedic medicine.
